templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about your order or first purchase. Did you have a question on a specific product? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about your order or first purchase. First time shopping with us or a return customer? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your your order or first purchase enquiry: Want me to grab the size / colour stock for you? What's a good time?
instant_sms.ps: PS. You can reply STOP anytime and we'll take you off the list. ABN on file, address in our reply email.
